productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Printed Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves with slightly distressed graphic print on the chest and stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Wear your brand with pride and relive the 'Old Glory' of the air force as reflected in this T-shirt from locomotive. Crafted from soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort which, combined with the stylish graphic print, makes this tee a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
